description.value:
A bio-reactive body glove with a non-reflective surface that moulds itself to the wearer's form.

Effect: Grants 2 AP to all unarmoured locations, +10 to Stealth Tests, and renders the wearer invisible to infra-red goggles and Dark Sight.

Notes: -
